related_stage_3_architecture_constraints: API command operations for workflow transitions
Signed links for generated output sharing

interaction_principles: Keep primary actions visible and contextual.
Use wizards only for sequential setup or import mapping.
Use split views for list-to-detail workflows.
Use command confirmations for destructive, external-sharing, approval, or irreversible state changes.
Never hide async work; every background job has progress, failure, and retry affordances.

interaction_patterns.name: Review And Commit
interaction_patterns.behavior: Users review staged changes, see validation warnings, then commit or save draft.

interaction_patterns.name: Preview Before Generate
interaction_patterns.behavior: System previews calculated outputs before user commits to generated output or approval.

interaction_patterns.name: Async Progress With Recovery
interaction_patterns.behavior: Show queued, processing, completed, failed, retrying, and failed-final states with job details.

interaction_patterns.name: Permission-Aware Actions
interaction_patterns.behavior: Unavailable actions are hidden when irrelevant and disabled with explanation when context matters.

feedback_patterns: Inline validation for forms and mappings
Persistent banner for async jobs or blocked workflows
Status badges for draft, review, approved, sent, failed, and archived states
Audit timeline for pricing, import, and quote transitions

ux_decisions.decision: Use persistent sidebar navigation with contextual detail tabs.
ux_decisions.rationale: Operational users need fast movement across related sourcing, pricing, and quote workflows.

ux_decisions.decision: Expose background job state through a status center and contextual banners.
ux_decisions.rationale: Stage 3 requires async imports and document generation.

ux_risks.risk: Users may not understand why actions are disabled by permissions or missing prerequisites.
ux_risks.mitigation: Disabled actions include concise reason and next step.

interaction_tradeoffs.cost: Requires careful responsive collapse on mobile.

stage_5_handoff_notes: Implement shared status badges, validation summaries, job progress panels, and permission-aware buttons.
